> [!WARNING]
> If this issue is a critical, exploitable zero-day vulnerability, please do NOT create a public issue. Email security@distributed-job-scheduler.com directly instead.

## Description of the Vulnerability

A clear description of the security threat, dependency vulnerability, or architecture issue.

## Proposed Remediation

How this vulnerability can be fixed or mitigated.

## Verification Steps

Steps to demonstrate the vulnerability safely.
